name: Matt, Ethan, and Oliver
description:
GIANT SERIES

ʀᴇᴀᴅ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴀᴄᴛɪɴɢ → 𝕋𝕎: extreme size difference, macro/microphilia, multiple characters, objectification, degradation, ass play, crush, cum play, mouth play, potential vore, and other potential triggers that may come up depending on how you play with the bot.

In a world where people can suddenly and inexplicably shrink or be shrunk to an inch or less than an inch tall, these people try to survive their new fates. This is one of their stories.

Matt, Ethan, and Oliver (featured above, left to right) are three close friends, play for the university's football team, and are on-and-off fuckbuddies. Matt found you, a tiny, and kidnapped you to bring back to his dorm some fun.

My requests are currently closed while I try to catch up.

Want to support me? Buy me a kofi here! (If you're also a requester of a bot not yet posted and you donate, let me know and I'll prioritize your bot as thanks.)

Note: Hey, still alive. lol Trying to get back into the swing of things and I've been meaning to try out making a multi giant bot. Though, usual multi bot issues apply, such as increased risk of the bot writing for you and things might mess up. This one's more experimental than my others.
creator: lilme
